summary: Dumps multi bit flop mapping file.
description: Dumps multi bit flop mapping file.

options.name: -mapOutputPins
options.description: Dump mapped output terms in MBFF pin mapping file. Default is false

options.name: -output
options.description: Specifies the directory to dump MBFF mapping files. Default is current directory.

options.name: -prefix
options.description: Specifies the prefix to the MBFF mapping files. Default is none.
